one_line: A skilled Indus Valley engineer overseeing brick-lined waterworks on the citadel mound of Mohenjo-daro, c. 2500–2000 BCE.

appearance.age_look: mid-20s, lean and wiry, with the build of someone used to outdoor supervision and hands-on construction
appearance.face: oval face with high cheekbones, warm medium-brown complexion, straight nose, sharp dark eyes under slightly arched brows, a short neatly trimmed beard and moustache, default expression focused and thoughtful with a hint of calm confidence
appearance.hair: thick black hair parted in the center, pulled back into a low, tidy knot at the back of the head, held with a simple narrow copper band circling the crown like a plain head-ring
appearance.costume: wears a knee-length, undyed off‑white cotton tunic with short sleeves, straight and slightly loose, belted at the waist with a narrow brown leather strap; over one shoulder is a soft brick-red cotton shawl draped diagonally across the torso and falling behind the back, practical but slightly dignified; below, a plain mid-brown woven cloth wrapped skirt (dhoti-like) reaches mid-calf and is neatly pleated in front; feet are in simple brown leather sandals with thong straps; around his neck is a single strand of small, matte carnelian and steatite beads in alternating orange-red and pale grey; on his right wrist a narrow copper bangle, and on his left upper arm a small copper armlet shaped as a smooth band; no extravagant ornaments, all textiles appear handwoven with very subtle vertical striping visible on close inspection, but no printed patterns.
appearance.signature: a long L-shaped measuring staff of polished wood, marked with carved notches, carried in his right hand, and a rolled baked-clay plan tablet tucked under his left arm with faint incised grid-lines suggesting construction layouts.

ref_desc: A mid-20s Mohenjo-daro engineer with medium-brown skin, black hair in a low knot with a copper head-ring, off-white tunic, brick-red shoulder shawl, brown wrapped skirt, leather sandals, simple bead and copper jewelry, carrying a wooden L-shaped measuring staff and a clay plan tablet.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of a Mohenjo-daro hydraulic engineer on the citadel mound, shown front and three-quarter views: a lean young man with medium-brown skin, oval face, sharp dark eyes, short neat beard and moustache, and thick black hair parted in the center and tied into a low knot at the back, circled by a simple narrow copper head-ring; he wears an undyed off-white knee-length cotton tunic with short sleeves, belted at the waist with a narrow brown leather strap, a brick-red cotton shawl draped over one shoulder across his torso and hanging behind, a plain mid-brown wrapped cloth skirt reaching mid-calf with neat front pleats, and simple brown leather sandals; modest jewelry includes a single strand of small carnelian and steatite beads around his neck, a narrow copper bangle on the right wrist, and a plain copper armlet on the left upper arm; in his right hand he holds a long L-shaped wooden measuring staff marked with carved notches, and under his left arm he tucks a rolled baked-clay plan tablet incised with faint grid-lines; keep the palette to off-white, brick red, mid-brown, copper, and carnelian orange-red, with clean, historically grounded garments but stylised shonen-anime energy and proportions, against a neutral background that suggests but does not detail brick architecture or waterworks.
